trigger_reason: The agent prioritizes narrative coherence and MITRE framework compliance over raw data validation, treating the investigation as a writing task rather than a forensic evidence retrieval task.
improvements: Evidence-Linking Protocol: Every assertion in the summary must explicitly cite an Evidence Object ID (EOID) generated during the telemetry collection phase.
Negative Result Documentation requirement: 'Not found' assertions must include the specific source telemetry log (e.g., EID 4624, EID 4688) and the time window searched.

checklist.note: Mandatory cross-reference against previous INV-IDs; if no history exists, must document as 'First observed event'.
Must include file hashes, process command lines, and specific registry path modifications for every mapped MITRE technique.
When asserting 'not found', explicitly document: [Telemetry Source] + [Query Parameters] + [Start/End Time].
Include enrichment data: ASN reputation, geo-location, and threat intelligence feed matches for every external IP cited.
Reconstruct chronological sequence using ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) linked to specific raw log signatures.
